segments.text:
* *Result* ~can~ be inserted into **markdown**.
 $$
 S = (\pi * d^2) / 4 = ${S}
 $$
> Latex math can be used in markdown $\int$

More examples here:
* [**lab 1.1.1**](https://labkeeper.io/project/8c6b50d6-e1b2-4795-ab81-7aa4407d05b5)
